there's no actual guide but there is a decent tier list that explains things (https://docs.google.com/document/d/1liixnERyCP2wot_yHQKNq9jQNa4MTs93z0VSjNXQP5I) a little old since it doesn't have tawil but still very good (tawil is around a tier or so roughly)
a good chunk of the game is poking around and figuring things out since the community is somewhat small
the basic things you should focus on when you start out are clearing story and seeing what realm you like to play with the most (go to interlude and then this, it lets you try every standard banner character and gives a free pull for each one you do)
